(If you love being dominated, I also have other hardcore ones you can find on my profile! :D I like making bots on topics that are rarer and making more personalized experiences. If you have an idea for a bot [can be POV of choice] on a topic or kink you don't feel is seen enough, drop the idea in the comments!)
[user and character are not blood related. Both user and character are adults.]
